title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 444.160 - Costs, paid by whom
text:
444.160.  Costs, paid by whom. — The costs attending the giving notice, making application and receiving mining privileges shall all be paid by the person, company or corporation making the same, and no such privilege shall take effect until all such costs be paid.
(RSMo 1939 § 14800) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13610; 1919 § 7453; 1909 § 8425
